import Button from "../components/Button"; function ContactSupport() { return (

Contact

Need help with your order or account? Send us a quick message and our support team will respond within 24 hours.

Email: support@novacart.com

Phone: +1 (800) 555-0148

Address: 223 Market Street, Seattle, WA
